instruction.title: Asset Analysis & Visual Foundations
instruction.overview: This document catalog audits all workspace static vectors, color tokens, and font families. It serves as the design spec foundation for visual elements and motion.

vector.name: cube-16-solid.svg
vector.role: Core Brand Logo and primary Header branding icon.
vector.placement: Page header, favicon, Bento automation card graphic.

vector.name: cog-8-tooth.svg
vector.role: Visual representation of engine, automations, and processing.
vector.placement: Hero dynamic card, feature header badge.

vector.name: chart-pie.svg
vector.placement: Feature showcase cards, Bento metrics widget.

vector.name: arrow-trending-up.svg
vector.role: Indicates pipeline acceleration and optimization growth.
vector.placement: Pro Plan highlight badge, Bento grid data indicators.

vector.name: link.svg
vector.role: Represents active URLs and API links.
vector.placement: Bento integration grid, technical doc references.

vector.name: arrow-path.svg
vector.role: Indicates syncing processes and reload states.
vector.placement: Pricing calculation animations, FAQ state indicators.

vector.name: search.svg
vector.placement: Developer Experience section filter inputs, Bento grid data search illustration.

vector.name: chevron-down.svg
vector.placement: Currency selection buttons, FAQ accordion headers.

vector.name: x-mark.svg
vector.placement: Mobile drawer close trigger, input resets.

font.use_cases: Display Headings, Section Titles, Card Headers, Body copy, narrative details, testimonial quotes, input labels, button text, Forms, UI Inputs, Button Labels
Numeric Prices, Metric Values (99.99%, 50M+, 23ms), Code Snippets, Terminal Commands, CLI Examples, Timers, Category Chips

color.name: Deep Saffron
color.role: CTA Hover backgrounds, Gradient end points
